pages.name: course-overview
pages.title: About training
pages.heading: About this training course
pages.body:
This is placeholder course overview content managed in Contentful.

The course is made up of several modules that you can work through in any order. Each module takes between 1 and 2 hours to complete.

You can:

- start and pause the training at any point so you can complete each module at your own pace
- get practical ideas to use in your setting
- use the learning log to make notes of your reflections
- test your knowledge and reflect on your own practice
- complete the modules in any order
- download a certificate of completion after each module

All children develop at different paces. By understanding earlier stages of child development, it is possible to plan and meet the diverse needs of children in any setting.

Dummy text only — replace with real copy in Contentful.

pages.name: accessibility-statement
pages.title: Accessibility statement
pages.heading: Accessibility statement
pages.body:
This accessibility statement applies to Early years child development training.

This website is run by the Department for Education. We want as many people as possible to be able to use this website.

## How accessible this website is

We know some parts of this website are not fully accessible. We are working to improve accessibility across the service.

## Feedback and contact information

If you need information on this website in a different format, contact the service team.

## Reporting accessibility problems

If you find any problems that are not listed on this page or you think we're not meeting accessibility requirements, contact us.

pages.name: terms-and-conditions
pages.title: Terms and conditions
pages.heading: Terms and conditions
pages.body:
These terms and conditions explain how you may use Early years child development training.

## Using this service

You must keep your account details secure and not share your login with anyone else.

You agree to use this service only for its intended purpose of completing early years child development training.

## Your information

We process your personal data in line with our privacy policy.

## Changes to these terms

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service means you accept any changes.

pages.name: wifi-and-data
pages.title: Free internet, wifi and data resources
pages.heading: Free internet, wifi and data resources
pages.body:
Some modules contain videos. Connect to wifi before starting a module to avoid using your mobile data allowance.

## Free wifi, internet and data resources

If you have limited or no internet access, these resources may help:

- Ask your setting whether wifi is available for staff training
- Use public library internet services where available
- Contact your local authority for support schemes in your area

Plan your training when you have a stable connection so your progress can be saved.

pages.name: help
pages.title: Help
pages.heading: Help
pages.body:
Get help using Early years child development training.

## Signing in

You sign in using GOV.UK One Login. Use the same email address each time so your training progress is saved.

## Completing the training

You can start and pause the training at any point and complete the modules in any order. Your progress is saved automatically as you work through each module.

## Contact us

If you are having problems using the service, contact the service team for support.

pages.name: sitemap
pages.title: Sitemap
pages.heading: Sitemap
pages.body: Find your way around Early years child development training.

pages.name: new-registration
pages.title: New registration
pages.heading: New registration
pages.body:
If you are registering for the first time, you will need a GOV.UK One Login account.

Create an account or sign in, then complete the registration steps to access the training modules.

pages.name: other-problems-signing-in
pages.title: Other problems signing in
pages.heading: Other problems signing in
pages.body:
If you are having trouble signing in with GOV.UK One Login:

- Check you are using the same email address you used when you first registered for this training
- Reset your GOV.UK One Login password if needed
- Contact GOV.UK One Login support if you cannot access your account

If you still cannot access your training progress, contact the service team.

pages.body: Downloadable promotional materials for Early years child development training will be published here when available.

pages.name: whats-new
pages.title: What's new in the training
pages.heading: What's new in the training
pages.body:
Welcome back. Here is what is new since your last visit.

## New modules and updates

Check **My modules** to see modules that are available to you and any updates to content you have already started.

[Continue to My modules](/my-modules)

pages.name: privacy-policy
pages.title: Privacy policy
pages.heading: Privacy policy
pages.body:
This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal data when you use Early years child development training.

## What data we collect

We collect information you provide during registration, including your name, where you live, setting details and email preferences.

## How we use your data

We use your data to provide the training service, personalise your certificates, and send email updates if you opt in.

## Your rights

You can update your details from My account or ask us to close your account at any time.

pages.name: email-preferences
pages.title: Email preferences
pages.heading: Email preferences
pages.body:
You can change whether you receive emails about this training course from **My account**.

[Continue to My modules](/my-modules)
